description_long: This is a modern, boxy sofa with a clean-lined silhouette and a low profile, upholstered in a light fabric. The sofa features two large seat cushions and a set of five loose back cushions, with three in a lighter shade and two in a darker contrasting color. The armrests are wide, straight, and padded, matching the overall geometric form of the sofa. The backrest is straight and runs the full width of the sofa, providing support for the loose cushions. The legs are not visible, suggesting a hidden or recessed base that gives the sofa a grounded, monolithic appearance. The upholstery appears to be a solid, smooth fabric with no visible patterns or decorative stitching.
description: A modern, boxy sofa with light upholstery, wide straight armrests, and a mix of light and dark loose cushions. The design is clean and minimal, with a hidden base and smooth fabric.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width, two seat cushions, five loose back cushions in contrasting colors, and wide straight armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the thickness of the armrest, and the profile of the back cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the straight, continuous backrest and the tops of the loose back cushions.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the armrest and cushion profile from the other side.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Five loose back cushions (three light, two dark) arranged in a row, two large seat cushions, all cushions are uniform in size and unattached.
attribute_armrest_style: Wide, straight, and padded armrests at each end, matching the sofa's height and featuring a boxy, geometric profile with no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Legs are not visible, suggesting a hidden or recessed base that is fully covered by the upholstery, giving a floating or grounded appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Straight, continuous backrest running the full width of the sofa, supporting loose back cushions, with no visible tufting or segmentation.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid, smooth fabric with no visible patterns, decorative stitching, or textural detailing.
